title: Compliance checks: UK Tobacco Track and Trace — penalties and sanctions — CC/FS76
body: "This factsheet provides information about:   the Tobacco Track and Trace (TT&T) scheme how to register for the scheme how to meet the obligations of the scheme what happens when you do not meet the obligations of the scheme how to appeal against a decision   Factsheets are for guidance only and reflect HMRC’s position at the time of writing.  "
